title: Find and Replace for Automations
excerpt: I think it would be helpful to have a feature where you can find all mentions of Board within your automations and replace all with Board B. Currently, it seems like you have to alter individual automations which can be …

posts.author: vmull29 (V)
posts.cookedHtml: I think it would be helpful to have a feature where you can find all mentions of Board within your automations and replace all with Board B. Currently, it seems like you have to alter individual automations which can be time consuming.
